news.title: Shumaila Chishti wins the 2026 Provost Award for Excellence in Teaching by a Lecturer
news.body: Recently we learned that Dr. Shumaila Chishti has been awarded the 2026 Provost Award for Excellence in Teaching by a Lecturer!

news.title: Prof Jed Pixley selected as 2026 Student Success Champion Award Recipient
